# Elicitation.IsElicitationMode method

Returns `true` when *value* is one of the two defined elicitation modes (spec §20.3).

```csharp
public static bool IsElicitationMode(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate mode string. |

## Return Value

`true` when `"form"` or `"url"`.
